properties.description: Located in the heart of Hammamet, this 5-star resort is perfect for families and couples. From spacious suites to bungalows specially designed for families, every corner of Iberostar Selection Mirage Hammamet will become your home away from home.

Hotel Khayam Garden Beach & Spa Nabeul

properties.description: On the seafront of Hammamet beach, the Iberostar Waves Averroes has 30,000 m2 of gardens and palm trees, plus spa area, free Wi-Fi, comfort rooms, large swimming pool, water sports, meeting rooms, optional All Inclusive and 2 golf courses nearby.
